checks.name: schema
checks.detail: Task artifacts satisfy the declared schemas

checks.name: step_scope
checks.detail: Changed files stay within the declared step scope

checks.name: verification_refs
checks.detail: Verification refs resolve into canonical verification entries

checks.name: explanation
checks.detail: Explanation summary is present when the plan requires it

checks.name: preconditions
checks.detail: Preconditions are backed by declared verification signals

checks.name: subagent
checks.detail: No subagent scope needs validation in this bootstrap plan

checks.name: rust
checks.detail: Rust changes are backed by declared cargo check evidence

checks.name: odin
checks.detail: Odin changes are backed by declared odin check evidence

checks.name: abi
checks.detail: Checked-in ABI bindings match the normative header

checks.name: protocol_contract_alignment
checks.detail: Kernel and Rust protocol contracts align across the assembly bridge boundary

checks.name: layout_parity
checks.detail: Heartbeat payload layout matches across the C contract, Odin bindings, and Rust bindings

checks.name: execution_foundation
checks.detail: Source bridge declarations and freestanding amd64 bridge symbols are present

checks.name: bridge_alignment
checks.detail: Assembly ingress registers and the exported Odin dispatcher signature align with the trap-path contract

checks.name: runtime_trap_path
checks.detail: Rust calls extern syscall_entry and the assembly bridge routes the request into syscall_dispatch

checks.name: return_path_proof
checks.detail: Rust validates returned payload mutations after syscall_entry and Odin writes those mutations through the payload pointer

checks.name: execution_proof
checks.detail: Kernel and Rust sources prove the ordered heartbeat contract for the current runtime-trap implementation

sub_results.name: nil_guard
sub_results.detail: kernel/main.odin guards nil payloads and returns the ABI error-equivalent constant first

sub_results.name: magic_guard
sub_results.detail: kernel/main.odin validates the heartbeat magic before mutation

sub_results.name: mutation_order
sub_results.detail: kernel/main.odin performs guards, ingress trace, ordered payload mutations, egress trace, and success return in sequence

sub_results.name: rust_failure_path
sub_results.detail: userspace/core_service initializes the expected values, checks abi::K_OK explicitly, and has a heavy failure branch

sub_results.name: postcondition_checks
sub_results.detail: userspace/core_service validates the returned payload fields and status bits after the bridge call

sub_results.name: serial_log_stability
sub_results.detail: kernel/arch/x86_64/serial.odin provides the stable trace strings for future parsing

checks.name: evidence
checks.detail: Evidence file references resolve on disk
